---
title: "Emily Dampier"
---

## Emily Dampier

**Dates:** (b.1838/9)

### Description

neighbour of CMY

### Biography

Sister of Jane Mary (Dampier) Smith-Dampier, and daughter of Margaret Sarah Dampier, she lived at Twyford House, near Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 11th [1886]
- Letter from Easter day [5 April 1885]
- Letter from April 1st [after 1875]
- Letter from July 5th [1870]
- Letter from Jan 17th [1870]
- Letter from April 4th [1868]
- Letter from [June 1864][[footnote:1]] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
